_meta.skipped_reason: These folder names do not exist in the pinned HF transformers commit at /tmp/hf_transformers_pinned/src/transformers/models/. Listing under that directory only returns the names actually present; none of the six matched (e.g. neither 'minicpm' nor 'midashnet' nor 'llada' nor 'lightonocr' resolved to any folder).
caveats: Bart-style encoder-decoder attention (Marian/MBart/M2M-100) is a single class used for encoder self-attn, decoder self-attn, and decoder cross-attn -- there is no kb-nano L2 wrapper for this exact pattern, so per the audit rule it decomposes to L1 (linear, sdpa). Whisper has a kb-nano L2 wrapper but Whisper-style cross-attention with paged-KV cache is a different path; we do not list whisper_attention.py for Bart-family.
Longformer's sliding-window+global attention is a unique kernel with no kb-nano analog; it decomposes to L1 (linear, softmax) but the load-bearing local-window kernel is not present.
LongT5LocalAttention / LongT5TransientGlobalAttention are unique kernels with no kb-nano L2 analog; partial L1 decomposition only.

LiltSelfAttention adds parallel layout-stream attention (channel_shrink_ratio'd parallel projections plus cross-stream score addition) on top of BERT-style attention. No kb-nano file matches; partial L1 decomposition only.

LukeSelfAttention has optional entity-aware attention (4-way w2w/w2e/e2w/e2e query projections). Standard mode matches BERT-style encoder self-attention; entity-aware mode is a unique kernel with no kb-nano analog.

Mimi text-transformer attention is Llama-style with KV cache, sliding window (per-config), and Llama-style RoPE -- structurally matchable to L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention; however the SEANet conv1d encoder/decoder stack is a custom causal-padding variant with weight-norm and padding-cache that does not have a dedicated kb-nano file (decomposes to L1/conv1d.py + L1/conv_transpose1d.py).

MgpstrAttention uses fused single qkv linear (Linear(d, 3d)). Closest kb-nano file is L2/clip_attention.py (separate q/k/v) which is structurally similar but parameter layout differs -- listed as decomposes to L1 (linear, softmax) instead.
MaskFormerDetrSelfAttention/CrossAttention add position embeddings to Q,K (not V) -- DETR-style. No kb-nano file matches this pattern; decomposes to L1.

MaskFormerSwinSelfAttention is a window-attention variant with relative-position-bias index. kb-nano has L2/swinv2_window_attention.py and L2/swinv2_patch_merging.py, but they are SwinV2-specific (continuous bias MLP + log-spaced coords), not the SwinV1-style discrete bucket of MaskFormer-Swin. Listed as decomposes to L1 with caveat.

MiniCPMV4_6VisionAttention extends VisionAttention(L2) but with separate q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/out_proj (not fused QKV). The L2 file uses fused QKVParallelLinear, so we mark this row decomposes to L1 (linear, dense_attention) with the kb-nano vision_attention noted in rationale as inheritance source but not exact match.
MiniCPMV4_6VisionMLP inherits SiglipMLP (Linear+GELU+Linear); maps cleanly to L2/siglip_mlp.py.

Llava/LlavaNext/LlavaNextVideo/LlavaOnevision are pure VLM wirings: a vision tower (typically SigLIP/CLIP) + multi-modal projector (Linear+act+Linear) + AutoModel language model. The only own-compute classes are the multimodal projectors (decompose to L1/linear+L1/gelu) and LlavaNextVideoPooler (avg/max/conv2d pool); everything else is composes.

classes.name: LightGluePositionalEncoder
classes.rationale: single Linear(2, head_dim/2) projector + interleave + cos/sin to build per-keypoint rotary frequencies. Computes RoPE freqs cache only; the actual RoPE application happens inside LightGlueAttention via apply_rotary_pos_emb. Only L1/linear.py is invoked here.

classes.name: LightGlueAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaAttention but overrides forward; deletes self.rotary_emb so HF cos/sin is supplied externally. Uses separate q/k/v Linear projections (not fused QKV), supports cross-attention (key_value_states optional), no KV cache, non-causal SDPA over full dense [B,H,T,D]. Does NOT match L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention (which is causal+paged-KV+QKVParallelLinear) or any encoder L2 wrapper. Decomposes to L1 (linear, rotary_emb for Llama-style cos/sin RoPE, sdpa for non-causal dense attention).

classes.name: LightGlueMLP
classes.rationale: fc1(intermediate, intermediate) -> LayerNorm -> ACT2FN[gelu] -> fc2. Includes LayerNorm before activation, which differs from L2/clip_mlp.py (Linear->QuickGELU->Linear, no norm). Decomposes to L1: linear, layer_norm, gelu.

classes.name: LightGlueTransformerLayer
classes.rationale: Wires self-attn + self-mlp + cross-attn (with image-pair flip) + cross-mlp. Composes.

classes.name: LightGlueMatchAssignmentLayer
classes.rationale: final_projection(Linear) and matchability(Linear) plus log-double-softmax (logsigmoid + log_softmax + scatter). Decomposes to L1: linear, sigmoid, softmax. No specialized kb-nano file.

classes.name: LightGlueTokenConfidenceLayer
classes.rationale: single Linear(d,1) + sigmoid. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LightGlueForKeypointMatching
classes.rationale: Top-level model: input_projection (Linear) + LightGluePositionalEncoder + N x LightGlueTransformerLayer + match-assignment heads. Composes.

classes.name: LiltTextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: RoBERTa-style word + position + token_type embeddings + LayerNorm with padding-aware position id creation. Matches L2/encoder_embeddings.py:XLMRobertaEmbeddings (same padding_idx + position_ids logic).

classes.name: LiltLayoutEmbeddings
classes.rationale: x/y/h/w + box-position embeddings concatenated then projected (Linear) + LayerNorm + dropout. Layout-specific; no kb-nano L2 match. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LiltSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style q/k/v plus PARALLEL layout_q/layout_k/layout_v stream with channel_shrink_ratio. Cross-stream score-addition (text scores += layout scores and vice-versa) is unique to LiLT; no kb-nano L2 file matches. Decomposes to L1 (linear, softmax) -- standard text path is encoder-style, but layout extension forces L1 only.

classes.name: LiltSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm(input + hidden). Same as BertSelfOutput; matches L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfOutput.

classes.name: LiltAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring around LiltSelfAttention + two LiltSelfOutput heads (text and layout). Composes.

classes.name: LiltIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN (typically gelu). Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate.

classes.name: LiltOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm(input + hidden). Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: LiltLayer
classes.rationale: Wires LiltAttention + (intermediate + output) for both text and layout streams. Composes.

classes.name: LiltEncoder
classes.rationale: Stack of LiltLayer. Composes.

classes.name: LiltPooler
classes.rationale: first-token Linear + Tanh pooler. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LiltModel
classes.rationale: Composes embeddings + encoder + pooler.

classes.name: LiltForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: task head over LiltModel. Composes.

classes.name: LiltForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: LiltClassificationHead
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh + Linear. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LiltForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: qa head. Composes.

classes.name: LlamaRMSNorm
classes.rationale: standard Llama-family RMSNorm (variance(x.float()).rsqrt * weight). Matches L1/rms_norm.py.

classes.name: LlamaRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: standard NeoX-style RoPE with optional Llama-3 frequency scaling. L1/rotary_emb.py implements the same with custom CUDA kernel and Llama-3.1 scaling.

classes.name: LlamaMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU: down(act(gate(x)) * up(x)). L2/llama_mlp.py uses fused gate_up_proj + SiluAndMul -> down_proj; identical compute.

classes.name: LlamaAttention
classes.rationale: GQA causal attention with separate q/k/v Linear, RoPE applied via cos/sin, paged KV cache via past_key_values.update. Matches L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention (fused QKVParallelLinear is the kb-nano form, but compute is identical: project -> RoPE -> store_kvcache -> flash_attn -> o_proj).

classes.name: LlamaDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: input_layernorm + self_attn + post_attention_layernorm + mlp residual stack. Composes (corresponding L3 is L3/llama_decoder.py).

classes.name: LlamaModel
classes.rationale: embed_tokens + N x LlamaDecoderLayer + final RMSNorm + rotary_emb. Composes.

classes.name: LlamaForCausalLM
classes.rationale: lm_head over model. Composes (top-level pipeline corresponds to L4/llama.py).

classes.name: Llama4TextExperts
classes.rationale: fused expert MLP: gate_up_proj [E, H, 2*I], down_proj [E, I, H], SwiGLU per-expert via bmm. L2/llama4_moe.py:Llama4MoE wraps this with FusedExperts L2 op (which calls L1/moe_grouped_gemm.py).

classes.name: Llama4TextMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP (gate/up/down with act_fn=silu). Same as LlamaMLP. L2/llama4_moe.py uses L2/llama_mlp.py:LlamaMLP for the shared expert path.

classes.name: Llama4TextL2Norm
classes.rationale: rsqrt(mean(x^2) + eps) without weight (weight-less RMSNorm). Maps to L1/l2_norm.py (per-vector L2 normalization). Note: kb-nano embeds this as the weight-less qk_norm option inside L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention.

classes.name: Llama4TextRMSNorm
classes.rationale: standard RMSNorm with weight. Matches L1/rms_norm.py.

classes.name: Llama4Router
classes.rationale: Linear projection, top-k logits, scatter, sigmoid. Matches L1/sigmoid_topk.py used by L2/llama4_moe.py.

classes.name: Llama4TextMoe
classes.rationale: router + N experts + shared_expert. Identical structure to L2/llama4_moe.py:Llama4MoE (which wires Linear router + sigmoid_topk + FusedExperts + shared LlamaMLP + AllReduce).

classes.name: Llama4TextRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: NeoX-style RoPE producing complex freqs_cis (vs Llama's cos/sin). Different output type but same underlying frequency math. kb-nano applies via cos/sin in L1/rotary_emb.py; the conversion is internal.

classes.name: Llama4TextAttention
classes.rationale: Llama4-specific attention with NoPE per-layer (no_rope_layers), L2-norm qk_norm on RoPE layers only, attn_temperature_tuning on NoPE layers only. L2/llama4_attention.py is the dedicated kb-nano file; L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention also implements all these via the (nope, use_weightless_qk_norm, attn_temperature_tuning) flags.

classes.name: Llama4TextDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: self_attn + (MoE or dense MLP based on layer_idx in moe_layers). Composes (L3/llama4_decoder.py).

classes.name: Llama4TextModel
classes.rationale: embed_tokens + decoder layers + RMSNorm. Composes.

classes.name: Llama4ForCausalLM
classes.rationale: lm_head over model. Composes (L4/llama4.py).

classes.name: Llama4VisionMLP2
classes.rationale: fc1 -> GELU -> dropout -> fc2 -> GELU. Two-layer MLP with GELU on both ends and dropout in the middle. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: Llama4MultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: single Linear(vision_output, text_hidden). L1/linear.py.

classes.name: Llama4VisionPixelShuffleMLP
classes.rationale: pixel_shuffle reshape + Llama4VisionMLP2. Composes.

classes.name: Llama4VisionAttention
classes.rationale: non-causal attention with separate q/k/v, complex-rotary on Q/K via vision_apply_rotary_emb (uses freqs_ci 2D vision rope). No GQA. kb-nano vision rotary L1/vision_rotary_emb.py applies different math (Qwen2-VL style), so this RoPE doesn't match. Decomposes to L1: linear + sdpa (eager attention path), with vision-specific 2D rope inlined.

classes.name: Llama4VisionMLP
classes.rationale: fc1(bias=True) -> GELU -> fc2(bias=True). Two-layer MLP, no gating. Could be L2/clip_mlp.py but uses GELU not QuickGELU, and uses bias. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: Llama4VisionEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: input_layernorm + Llama4VisionAttention + post_attention_layernorm + Llama4VisionMLP. Composes.

classes.name: Llama4VisionEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of vision encoder layers. Composes.

classes.name: Llama4UnfoldConvolution
classes.rationale: torch.nn.Unfold + Linear (patch tokenizer). Decomposes to L1; nn.Unfold has no kb-nano L1.

classes.name: Llama4VisionRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: computes 2D vision freqs_ci complex tensor at init from image patch grid coords. Pure tensor construction, no kb-nano L1 file. Composes.

classes.name: Llama4VisionModel
classes.rationale: Llama4UnfoldConvolution + cls_token + pos_emb + LayerNorm + encoder + LayerNorm + Llama4VisionPixelShuffleMLP. Composes.

classes.name: Llama4ForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: vision_model + multi_modal_projector + language_model. Composes (L4/llama4.py).

classes.name: LlavaMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: Linear -> ACT2FN[gelu/quickgelu per config] -> Linear. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LlavaModel
classes.rationale: vision_tower (AutoModel - typically CLIP/SigLIP) + multi_modal_projector + language_model (AutoModel). Composes.

classes.name: LlavaForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: lm_head + LlavaModel. Composes.

classes.name: LlavaNextMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: same shape as LlavaMultiModalProjector (Linear -> act -> Linear). Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LlavaNextModel
classes.rationale: vision_tower + image_newline param + multi_modal_projector + language_model + image-grid pinpoint logic for any-resolution pre-processing. Composes.

classes.name: LlavaNextForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: lm_head + LlavaNextModel. Composes.

classes.name: LlavaNextVideoPooler
classes.rationale: spatial pool over image_features (avg|max|conv 2D pooling). Decomposes to L1; one of avg_pool2d/max_pool2d/conv2d depending on config.spatial_pool_mode.

classes.name: LlavaNextVideoMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: pass (inherits LlavaNext); same Linear -> act -> Linear. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LlavaNextVideoModel
classes.rationale: Adds vision_resampler (LlavaNextVideoPooler) for video frame pooling. Composes.

classes.name: LlavaNextVideoForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: lm_head + LlavaNextVideoModel. Composes.

classes.name: LlavaOnevisionModel
classes.rationale: inherits LlavaNextVideoModel; only override is config plumbing and image-grid hyperparams. No new compute classes. Composes.

classes.name: LlavaOnevisionForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: inherits LlavaNextVideoForConditionalGeneration. Composes.

classes.name: LongformerEmbeddings
classes.rationale: RoBERTa-style word + position + token_type embeddings (pad-aware position ids). Same as L2/encoder_embeddings.py:XLMRobertaEmbeddings.

classes.name: LongformerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Sliding-window local attention plus separate global-attention path with dedicated query_global/key_global/value_global projections. Custom diagonal-stride matmul + chunk-based local-window kernel (no kb-nano analog). Decomposes to L1: linear + softmax; the load-bearing chunked-local kernel has no kb-nano L1.

classes.name: LongformerSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm(input + hidden). Same as BertSelfOutput; matches L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfOutput.

classes.name: LongformerAttention
classes.rationale: Wires LongformerSelfAttention + LongformerSelfOutput. Composes.

classes.name: LongformerIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN[gelu]. Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate.

classes.name: LongformerOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm(input + hidden). Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: LongformerLayer
classes.rationale: wires attention + intermediate + output. Composes.

classes.name: LongformerEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of LongformerLayer with attention_window padding logic. Composes.

classes.name: LongformerPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh first-token pooler. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LongformerLMHead
classes.rationale: Linear -> GELU -> LayerNorm -> decoder Linear. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LongformerModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + encoder + pooler. Composes.

classes.name: LongformerForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: LongformerForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: LongformerClassificationHead
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh + Linear. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LongformerForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: qa head. Composes.

classes.name: LongformerForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: LongformerForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: LongT5LayerNorm
classes.rationale: T5-style RMSNorm (rsqrt(mean(x^2)) + weight, no centering). Matches L1/t5_layer_norm.py.

classes.name: LongT5DenseActDense
classes.rationale: wi -> act -> dropout -> wo (non-gated FFN). Matches T5DenseActDense pattern; L2/t5_dense.py contains both gated and non-gated forms.

classes.name: LongT5DenseGatedActDense
classes.rationale: gated FFN: wi_0(act) * wi_1 -> dropout -> wo. Matches T5DenseGatedActDense in L2/t5_dense.py.

classes.name: LongT5LayerFF
classes.rationale: layer_norm + (DenseActDense or DenseGatedActDense) + dropout + residual. Composes.

classes.name: LongT5Attention
classes.rationale: T5 self-attention with relative position bias (encoder full + decoder causal + cross variants). Identical to T5Attention; matches L2/t5_attention.py:T5SelfAttention (which uses fused QKVParallelLinear, BMM, Softmax, and bucketed relative-position-bias Embedding).

classes.name: LongT5LocalAttention
classes.rationale: Block-local attention with per-block relative position bias and overlapping windows. Unique to LongT5; no kb-nano L2 analog. Decomposes to L1; the block-pad+window-mask kernel has no kb-nano L1.

classes.name: LongT5TransientGlobalAttention
classes.rationale: block-local attention plus transient-global-token side-attention with global-bias embedding. Unique to LongT5; no kb-nano L2 analog.

classes.name: LongT5LayerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: layer_norm + LongT5Attention + dropout + residual. Composes.

classes.name: LongT5LayerLocalSelfAttention
classes.rationale: layer_norm + LongT5LocalAttention + dropout + residual. Composes.

classes.name: LongT5LayerTransientGlobalSelfAttention
classes.rationale: layer_norm + LongT5TransientGlobalAttention + dropout + residual. Composes.

classes.name: LongT5LayerCrossAttention
classes.rationale: layer_norm + LongT5Attention(cross) + dropout + residual. Composes.

classes.name: LongT5Block
classes.rationale: self-attn-layer + (cross-attn-layer if decoder) + ff-layer. Composes (paralleling L3/t5_block.py).

classes.name: LongT5Stack
classes.rationale: embed_tokens + N x LongT5Block + final_layer_norm. Composes.

classes.name: LongT5Model
classes.rationale: encoder Stack + decoder Stack. Composes.

classes.name: LongT5ForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: lm_head + LongT5Model. Composes.

classes.name: LongT5EncoderModel
classes.rationale: encoder-only stack. Composes.

classes.name: LukeEmbeddings
classes.rationale: RoBERTa-style word + position + token_type embeddings (pad-aware). Matches L2/encoder_embeddings.py:XLMRobertaEmbeddings.

classes.name: LukeEntityEmbeddings
classes.rationale: entity_embeddings + entity_position_embeddings + token_type_embeddings + Linear + LayerNorm. LUKE-specific entity stream; no kb-nano L2 analog. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LukeSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style q/k/v plus optional entity-aware 4-way query path (w2w/w2e/e2w/e2e). When use_entity_aware_attention=False this is the same as BertSelfAttention; with True it has a unique 4-way query branching. Decomposes to L1 to cover the entity-aware mode (which is the default for LUKE).

classes.name: LukeSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm(input + hidden). Same as BertSelfOutput; matches L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfOutput.

classes.name: LukeAttention
classes.rationale: Wires LukeSelfAttention + LukeSelfOutput. Composes.

classes.name: LukeIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN[gelu]. Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate.

classes.name: LukeOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm(input + hidden). Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: LukeLayer
classes.rationale: Wires attention + intermediate + output for both word and entity streams. Composes.

classes.name: LukeEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of LukeLayer. Composes.

classes.name: LukePooler
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh first-token pooler. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: EntityPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN[gelu] + LayerNorm. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: EntityPredictionHead
classes.rationale: transform + decoder Linear. Composes.

classes.name: LukeModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + entity_embeddings + encoder + pooler. Composes.

classes.name: LukeLMHead
classes.rationale: Linear -> gelu -> LayerNorm -> decoder Linear. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LukeForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: LukeForEntityClassification
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: LukeForEntityPairClassification
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: LukeForEntitySpanClassification
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: LukeForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: LukeForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: LukeForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: qa head. Composes.

classes.name: LukeForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: GeLU
classes.rationale: wraps F.gelu. Matches L1/gelu.py.

classes.name: LxmertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word + position + token_type embeddings + LayerNorm. Matches L2/encoder_embeddings.py:BertEmbeddings.

classes.name: LxmertAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style separate q/k/v with optional ctx_dim != hidden_size for cross-modal cross-attention. Same as BertAttention but with custom context tensor input. The non-ctx case matches L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention; the cross-modal ctx_dim case (used by LxmertCrossAttentionLayer) does not. Decomposes to L1 to cover both modes.

classes.name: LxmertAttentionOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout + LayerNorm(input + hidden). Same as BertSelfOutput; matches L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfOutput.

classes.name: LxmertCrossAttentionLayer
classes.rationale: Wires LxmertAttention(cross) + LxmertAttentionOutput. Composes.

classes.name: LxmertSelfAttentionLayer
classes.rationale: Wires LxmertAttention(self) + LxmertAttentionOutput. Composes.

classes.name: LxmertIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN[gelu]. Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate.

classes.name: LxmertOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout + LayerNorm(input + hidden). Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: LxmertLayer
classes.rationale: Wires self-attn + intermediate + output. Composes.

classes.name: LxmertXLayer
classes.rationale: Cross-modal block: language self-attn + visual self-attn + cross-attn + 2 FFNs. Composes.

classes.name: LxmertVisualFeatureEncoder
classes.rationale: visual_feat + box pos embedding via Linear + LayerNorm + LayerNorm. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LxmertEncoder
classes.rationale: stacks LxmertLayer (lang only) + LxmertXLayer (cross-modal) + visual encoder. Composes.

classes.name: LxmertPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh first-token pooler. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LxmertPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN + LayerNorm. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LxmertLMPredictionHead
classes.rationale: transform + decoder Linear. Composes.

classes.name: LxmertVisualAnswerHead
classes.rationale: two-layer MLP head with GELU + LayerNorm. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: LxmertVisualObjHead
classes.rationale: transform + decoder Linears. Composes.

classes.name: LxmertPreTrainingHeads
classes.rationale: wires LMPredictionHead + classifier Linear. Composes.

classes.name: LxmertModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + encoder + pooler. Composes.

classes.name: LxmertForPreTraining
classes.rationale: task heads. Composes.

classes.name: LxmertForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: qa head. Composes.

classes.name: M2M100ScaledWordEmbedding
classes.rationale: nn.Embedding subclass with embed_scale multiplier on output. L1/embedding.py covers the lookup; the scalar scale multiply is inline.

classes.name: M2M100SinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: fixed sinusoidal position table built on init; lookup at forward. L1/sinusoidal_embed.py provides the same pattern.

classes.name: M2M100Attention
classes.rationale: Bart-style: single class for encoder self-attn (non-causal), decoder self-attn (causal, paged-KV-equivalent past_key_values), and decoder cross-attn (key_value_states + EncoderDecoderCache). Separate q/k/v Linear (no GQA, no RoPE). Decomposes to L1; no kb-nano L2 wrapper for this triple-purpose Bart pattern (whisper_attention has 3 separate sibling classes; t5_attention requires relative bias). Per audit rule: Bart-family encoder-decoder attention -> decompose to L1.

classes.name: M2M100EncoderLayer
classes.rationale: self_attn_layer_norm + M2M100Attention + LayerNorm + fc1+gelu+fc2 + LayerNorm. Composes.

classes.name: M2M100DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: self_attn + cross_attn + FFN. Composes.

classes.name: M2M100Encoder
classes.rationale: embed_tokens (scaled) + sinusoidal pos + N x EncoderLayer + final LayerNorm. Composes.

classes.name: M2M100Decoder
classes.rationale: embed_tokens + sinusoidal pos + N x DecoderLayer + final LayerNorm. Composes.

classes.name: M2M100Model
classes.rationale: encoder + decoder. Composes.

classes.name: M2M100ForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: lm_head + M2M100Model. Composes.

classes.name: MambaMixer
classes.rationale: v1 selective-scan mixer: in_proj([x,gate]) -> causal_conv1d -> x_proj -> dt_proj + selective_scan + out_proj. L2/mamba_mixer.py:MambaMixer mirrors vLLM's MambaMixer (uses causal_conv1d_fn/causal_conv1d_update + selective_scan_fn/selective_state_update from vllm.model_executor.layers.mamba.ops).

classes.name: MambaRMSNorm
classes.rationale: standard Llama-family RMSNorm (variance-only, weight). Matches L1/rms_norm.py.

classes.name: MambaBlock
classes.rationale: norm + mixer + residual. Composes (L3/mamba_decoder.py).

classes.name: MambaModel
classes.rationale: embed_tokens + N x MambaBlock + final norm. Composes.

classes.name: MambaForCausalLM
classes.rationale: lm_head + MambaModel. Composes (L4/mamba.py).

classes.name: MambaRMSNormGated
classes.rationale: RMSNorm with gate (x * silu(gate.float()) -> rmsnorm). L1/rms_norm_gated.py provides the fused kernel. Note: kb-nano L2/mamba2_mixer.py:Mixer2RMSNormGated wraps this for per-group/TP.

classes.name: Mamba2Mixer
classes.rationale: SSD mixer: in_proj([x, conv_dim, dt_heads]) -> causal_conv1d -> mamba_chunk_scan_combined_varlen (prefill) / selective_state_update (decode) -> rmsnorm_gated -> out_proj. L2/mamba2_mixer.py:Mamba2Mixer mirrors vLLM's MambaMixer2 (bit-for-bit kernel calls).

classes.name: Mamba2RMSNorm
classes.rationale: standard RMSNorm (variance-only, weight). Matches L1/rms_norm.py.

classes.name: Mamba2Block
classes.rationale: norm + Mamba2Mixer + residual. Composes (L3/mamba2_decoder.py).

classes.name: Mamba2Model
classes.rationale: embed_tokens + N x Mamba2Block + final norm. Composes.

classes.name: Mamba2ForCausalLM
classes.rationale: lm_head + Mamba2Model. Composes (L4/mamba2.py).

classes.name: MarianSinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: nn.Embedding subclass with sinusoidal weight init (no learning). Matches L1/sinusoidal_embed.py.

classes.name: MarianAttention
classes.rationale: Bart-style triple-purpose attention (encoder self / decoder self with causal mask / cross-attn with EncoderDecoderCache). Separate q/k/v Linear, no GQA, no RoPE. Same pattern as M2M100Attention/MBartAttention. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MarianEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: self_attn_layer_norm + MarianAttention + final_layer_norm + fc1+act+fc2. Composes.

classes.name: MarianDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: self_attn + cross_attn + FFN. Composes.

classes.name: MarianEncoder
classes.rationale: embed_tokens (scaled) + sinusoidal pos + N x EncoderLayer. Composes.

classes.name: MarianDecoder
classes.rationale: embed_tokens + sinusoidal pos + N x DecoderLayer. Composes.

classes.name: MarianModel
classes.rationale: encoder + decoder. Composes.

classes.name: MarianMTModel
classes.rationale: lm_head + MarianModel + final_logits_bias. Composes.

classes.name: MarianDecoderWrapper
classes.rationale: wraps MarianDecoder. Composes.

classes.name: MarianForCausalLM
classes.rationale: lm_head + decoder-only. Composes.

classes.name: XPathEmbeddings
classes.rationale: concatenates xpath_unit_seq_embeddings (Embedding x max_depth) + Linear projection. MarkupLM-specific xpath stream; no kb-nano L2 analog. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MarkupLMEmbeddings
classes.rationale: RoBERTa-style word + position + token_type embeddings + xpath_embeddings + LayerNorm. Standard part matches L2/encoder_embeddings.py:XLMRobertaEmbeddings; xpath addition is summed in. Mapped to encoder_embeddings.py + xpath stream.

classes.name: MarkupLMSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm(input + hidden). Same as BertSelfOutput; matches L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfOutput.

classes.name: MarkupLMIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN[gelu]. Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate.

classes.name: MarkupLMOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm(input + hidden). Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput.

classes.name: MarkupLMPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh first-token pooler. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MarkupLMPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN + LayerNorm. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MarkupLMLMPredictionHead
classes.rationale: transform + decoder Linear. Composes.

classes.name: MarkupLMOnlyMLMHead
classes.rationale: wraps LMPredictionHead. Composes.

classes.name: MarkupLMSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style separate q/k/v Linear -> ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS dispatch. Standard encoder self-attention. Matches L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention.

classes.name: MarkupLMAttention
classes.rationale: Wires MarkupLMSelfAttention + MarkupLMSelfOutput. Composes (the bare *Attention class around *SelfAttention pattern).

classes.name: MarkupLMLayer
classes.rationale: attention + intermediate + output. Composes.

classes.name: MarkupLMEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of MarkupLMLayer. Composes.

classes.name: MarkupLMModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + encoder + pooler. Composes.

classes.name: MarkupLMForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: qa head. Composes.

classes.name: MarkupLMForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: MarkupLMForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerDetrLearnedPositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: row + col Embedding lookups concatenated to form 2D learned pos emb. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskFormerDetrSelfAttention
classes.rationale: DETR-style: position_embeddings added to Q,K only (not V). Separate q/k/v Linear, non-causal, no GQA, no KV cache. No kb-nano L2 file matches this DETR position-add pattern. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskFormerDetrCrossAttention
classes.rationale: DETR-style cross-attn: queries get position_embeddings (object queries), keys get encoder_position_embeddings, values get none. No kb-nano L2 file. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskFormerDetrMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 -> ACT2FN (typically relu/gelu) -> dropout -> fc2 -> dropout. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskFormerDetrDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: self_attn + LN + cross_attn + LN + MLP + LN. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerDetrConvBlock
classes.rationale: Conv2d + GroupNorm + ReLU. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskFormerDetrFPNFusionStage
classes.rationale: stacks ConvBlocks + interpolate. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerDetrMaskHeadSmallConv
classes.rationale: Conv2d + GroupNorm + ReLU + interpolate stack producing the segmentation mask. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskFormerDetrMHAttentionMap
classes.rationale: Q-projection (Linear) + K-projection (Conv2d) + multi-head dot-product yielding attention map. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskFormerDetrDecoder
classes.rationale: stack of MaskFormerDetrDecoderLayer + final LayerNorm. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerHungarianMatcher
classes.rationale: Hungarian assignment over class+mask costs (CPU scipy). Loss-side; compose / no kernel mapping.

classes.name: MaskFormerLoss
classes.rationale: training loss (cross-entropy + dice + sigmoid_focal). No inference compute kernel.

classes.name: MaskFormerFPNConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + GroupNorm + ReLU. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskFormerFPNLayer
classes.rationale: Conv + interpolate + ConvBlock chain. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerFPNModel
classes.rationale: FPN top-down stack. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerPixelDecoder
classes.rationale: FPN model + final mask conv. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerSinePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: DETR sine 2D position embedding. L1/sinusoidal_embed.py is 1D; this is 2D-extended but algorithmically the same.

classes.name: PredictionBlock
classes.rationale: Linear + activation. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskformerMLPPredictionHead
classes.rationale: stack of PredictionBlocks. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerPixelLevelModule
classes.rationale: wraps backbone (Swin/etc.) + MaskFormerPixelDecoder. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerTransformerModule
classes.rationale: Conv2d input proj + sine position embedding + queries embedding + MaskFormerDetrDecoder. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerModel
classes.rationale: PixelLevelModule + TransformerModule. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerForInstanceSegmentation
classes.rationale: MaskFormerModel + class predictor + mask predictor + Hungarian matcher + loss. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinEmbeddings
classes.rationale: patch_embeddings (MaskFormerSwinPatchEmbeddings) + position_embeddings + LayerNorm + dropout. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinPatchMerging
classes.rationale: 2x2 spatial merge + LayerNorm + Linear (4C->2C). Note: kb-nano L2/swinv2_patch_merging.py is SwinV2-specific (post-norm); this is SwinV1 pattern (pre-norm). Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinDropPath
classes.rationale: stochastic depth (random multiplier). No kernel; arithmetic only. Composes/skip.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinSelfAttention
classes.rationale: window-attention with discrete relative-position-bias-table (SwinV1-style). kb-nano L2/swinv2_window_attention.py is SwinV2-specific (continuous bias MLP + log-spaced coords). Decomposes to L1; window-mask handled inline.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout (no LayerNorm here, unlike BERT). Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinAttention
classes.rationale: Wires MaskFormerSwinSelfAttention + MaskFormerSwinSelfOutput. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN[gelu]. Same as BertIntermediate. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout (no LayerNorm here). Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinLayer
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + window-shift + attention + MLP + LayerNorm + drop_path. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinStage
classes.rationale: stack of MaskFormerSwinLayer + optional MaskFormerSwinPatchMerging. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of MaskFormerSwinStage. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + encoder + final LayerNorm + AdaptiveAvgPool1d. Composes.

classes.name: MaskFormerSwinBackbone
classes.rationale: wraps MaskFormerSwinModel as a backbone with feature_maps. Composes.

classes.name: MBartLearnedPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: learned absolute pos embedding (with offset 2). L1/embedding.py covers the lookup.

classes.name: MBartScaledWordEmbedding
classes.rationale: nn.Embedding subclass with embed_scale multiplier on output.

classes.name: MBartAttention
classes.rationale: Bart-style triple-purpose attention (encoder self / decoder self causal / cross-attn). Separate q/k/v Linear, no GQA, no RoPE. Same pattern as M2M100/Marian. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MBartEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: self_attn_layer_norm + MBartAttention + LayerNorm + fc1+act+fc2. Composes.

classes.name: MBartDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: self_attn + cross_attn + FFN. Composes.

classes.name: MBartClassificationHead
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh + Linear. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MBartEncoder
classes.rationale: embed_tokens (scaled) + learned pos + N x EncoderLayer + final LayerNorm. Composes.

classes.name: MBartDecoder
classes.rationale: embed_tokens + learned pos + N x DecoderLayer + final LayerNorm. Composes.

classes.name: MBartModel
classes.rationale: encoder + decoder. Composes.

classes.name: MBartForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: lm_head + MBartModel + final_logits_bias. Composes.

classes.name: MBartForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: MBartForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: qa head. Composes.

classes.name: MBartDecoderWrapper
classes.rationale: wraps MBartDecoder. Composes.

classes.name: MBartForCausalLM
classes.rationale: lm_head + decoder-only. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word + position + token_type embeddings + LayerNorm. Matches L2/encoder_embeddings.py:BertEmbeddings.

classes.name: MegatronBertSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style separate q/k/v Linear (with optional cross-attention via encoder_hidden_states + EncoderDecoderCache). Standard non-causal SDPA. Matches L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention; cross-attn variant decomposes to L1 but the parent kb-nano file covers self-attention path.

classes.name: MegatronBertSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout + residual (no LayerNorm here -- megatron-bert moves LN to MegatronBertAttention). Different from BertSelfOutput (which has LayerNorm). Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MegatronBertAttention
classes.rationale: LayerNorm (pre-norm) + MegatronBertSelfAttention + MegatronBertSelfOutput. Pre-norm convention is the megatron-bert difference. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN[gelu]. Matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate.

classes.name: MegatronBertOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout + residual (no LayerNorm here -- moved to MegatronBertLayer). Different from BertOutput. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MegatronBertLayer
classes.rationale: MegatronBertAttention + LayerNorm (pre-FFN) + intermediate + output. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of MegatronBertLayer + final LayerNorm. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh first-token pooler. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MegatronBertPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + ACT2FN + LayerNorm. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MegatronBertLMPredictionHead
classes.rationale: transform + decoder Linear. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertOnlyMLMHead
classes.rationale: wraps LMPredictionHead. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertOnlyNSPHead
classes.rationale: single Linear for binary NSP. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MegatronBertPreTrainingHeads
classes.rationale: wires MLM and NSP heads. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + encoder + pooler. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertForPreTraining
classes.rationale: MLM + NSP heads. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertForCausalLM
classes.rationale: lm_head with causal mask. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertForMaskedLM
classes.rationale: MLM head. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertForNextSentencePrediction
classes.rationale: NSP head. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertForSequenceClassification
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertForMultipleChoice
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertForTokenClassification
classes.rationale: task head. Composes.

classes.name: MegatronBertForQuestionAnswering
classes.rationale: qa head. Composes.

classes.name: MgpstrDropPath
classes.rationale: stochastic-depth (random scalar). Arithmetic only. Composes/skip.

classes.name: MgpstrEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch embedding + cls_token + pos_embed parameter + dropout. ViT-style. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MgpstrMlp
classes.rationale: fc1 -> GELU -> dropout -> fc2 -> dropout. Two-layer MLP. Closest is L2/clip_mlp.py but that uses QuickGELU + no LayerNorm + no dropout. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MgpstrAttention
classes.rationale: FUSED single qkv Linear (Linear(d, 3d) -> reshape -> chunk). Different param layout from L2/clip_attention.py (separate q/k/v). Standard non-causal multi-head attention. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MgpstrLayer
classes.rationale: norm1 + MgpstrAttention + drop_path + norm2 + MgpstrMlp + drop_path. Composes.

classes.name: MgpstrEncoder
classes.rationale: Sequential of MgpstrLayer with stochastic-depth schedule. Composes.

classes.name: MgpstrA3Module
classes.rationale: two grouped Conv2d (1x1) + softmax over tokens + einsum-attention + LayerNorm. MGP-STR-specific token-learner; no kb-nano L2 analog. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MgpstrModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + encoder. Composes.

classes.name: MgpstrForSceneTextRecognition
classes.rationale: MgpstrModel + 3 A3 modules + 3 head Linears (char/bpe/wordpiece). Composes.

classes.name: MimiConv1d
classes.rationale: Causal/asymmetric-padded Conv1d with optional weight-norm and a streaming padding cache. The underlying op is nn.Conv1d, mapped to L1/conv1d.py; the padding cache is Mimi-specific compose.

classes.name: MimiConvTranspose1d
classes.rationale: Causal/asymmetric-padded ConvTranspose1d. Maps to L1/conv_transpose1d.py.

classes.name: MimiResnetBlock
classes.rationale: ELU + MimiConv1d + ELU + MimiConv1d + shortcut. Composes.

classes.name: MimiEncoder
classes.rationale: SEANet encoder: stack of MimiConv1d / MimiResnetBlock / ELU. Composes.

classes.name: MimiLayerScale
classes.rationale: scalar parameter * x. Trivial; no kb-nano L1. Compose.

classes.name: MimiRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: standard Llama-style RoPE (cos/sin). Matches L1/rotary_emb.py.

classes.name: MimiMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 -> ACT2FN (typically gelu) -> fc2 (no bias). Two-layer MLP, no gating. Closest is L2/clip_mlp.py but that uses QuickGELU + bias. Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MimiAttention
classes.rationale: Llama-style decoder attention with separate q/k/v Linear, Llama-style RoPE, paged-KV via past_key_values.update, GQA, optional sliding_window. Matches L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention (which supports bias=True via config and sliding_window per layer). Compute layout differs in attention dispatch but algorithmic semantics match.

classes.name: MimiFlashAttention2
classes.rationale: MimiAttention with flash_attn dispatch override; same compute, same parameters.

classes.name: MimiSdpaAttention
classes.rationale: MimiAttention with SDPA dispatch override; same compute.

classes.name: MimiTransformerLayer
classes.rationale: input_layernorm + MimiAttention + MimiLayerScale + post_attention_layernorm + MimiMLP + MimiLayerScale. Composes.

classes.name: MimiTransformerModel
classes.rationale: stack of MimiTransformerLayer over a hidden_size codebook stream. Composes.

classes.name: MimiDecoder
classes.rationale: SEANet decoder mirroring MimiEncoder with ConvTranspose1d. Composes.

classes.name: MimiEuclideanCodebook
classes.rationale: VQ codebook lookup with L2 distance. Composes (no kb-nano analog for VQ argmin search).

classes.name: MimiVectorQuantization
classes.rationale: wraps codebook + Linear in/out. Composes.

classes.name: MimiResidualVectorQuantizer
classes.rationale: stack of VQ levels (residual). Composes.

classes.name: MimiSplitResidualVectorQuantizer
classes.rationale: splits two RVQ stacks (semantic + acoustic). Composes.

classes.name: MimiModel
classes.rationale: encoder + downsample/upsample MimiTransformerModel + RVQ + decoder. Composes.

classes.name: MiniCPMV4_6VisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: patch_embedding (Conv2d) + position_embedding (Embedding) lookup with bucketize-based per-image fractional position computation (Idefics3-style). Decomposes to L1; kb-nano has no Idefics3 vision-embeddings L2 file.

classes.name: MiniCPMV4_6VisionMLP
classes.rationale: pass (inherits SiglipMLP). SiglipMLP is fc1+GELU+fc2 -- matches L2/siglip_mlp.py.

classes.name: MiniCPMV4_6VisionAttention
classes.rationale: inherits Qwen2-VL VisionAttention but REPLACES fused QKV with separate q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/out_proj and removes RoPE. Forward dispatches via ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS with cu_seqlens for variable-length packed batches. Doesn't match L2/vision_attention.py (fused QKV+RoPE). Decomposes to L1; the load-bearing varlen flash-attn path is not exercised by the kb-nano L2 wrapper.

classes.name: MiniCPMV4_6VisionEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: SiglipEncoderLayer wiring with overridden self_attn=MiniCPMV4_6VisionAttention and mlp=MiniCPMV4_6VisionMLP. Composes.

classes.name: MiniCPMV4_6VisionEncoder
classes.rationale: stack of MiniCPMV4_6VisionEncoderLayer. Composes.

classes.name: MiniCPMV4_6ViTWindowAttentionMerger
classes.rationale: window-permuted self-attention (MiniCPMV4_6VisionAttention) + per-window pre_norm + linear_1 (block-diagonal init) + gelu_pytorch_tanh + linear_2. The custom block-diagonal init and gelu_pytorch_tanh activation make this MiniCPMV4_6-specific. Decomposes to L1; the inner attention reuses MiniCPMV4_6VisionAttention.

classes.name: MiniCPMV4_6VisionModel
classes.rationale: embeddings + encoder + post_layernorm + vit_merger. Composes.

classes.name: MiniCPMV4_6DownsampleMLP
classes.rationale: pre_norm + linear_1 + GELU + linear_2 (over 4x merged 2x2 patches). Decomposes to L1.

classes.name: MiniCPMV4_6Merger
classes.rationale: ModuleList of MiniCPMV4_6DownsampleMLP applied iteratively over patch grid. Composes.

classes.name: MiniCPMV4_6Model
classes.rationale: vision_tower + merger + language_model (AutoModel). Composes.

classes.name: MiniCPMV4_6ForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: lm_head + MiniCPMV4_6Model. Composes.
